subcodes.first_line: O servant of the travelers! This servitude is no mere servitude—it is kingship. This bondage is not vassalage, but sovereignty. This is the ultimate aspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم مسافران این خادمی نیست پادشاهیست چاکری نیست شهریاریست منتها آمال این
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @thankfulness; gratitude
